attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
SXXOA.BATCH_ID,
SXXOA.ACTION_CODE,
SXXOA.OA_ATTRIB_ID, 
SXXOA.ORDER_NUMBER, 
SXXOA.HEADER_ID, 
SXXOA.DATA_SOURCE, 
SXXOA.LINE_ID, 
SXXOA.PARENT_LINE_ID, 
SXXOA.ORDERED_ITEM, 
SXXOA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, 
SXXOA.ATTRIBUTION_FLAG , 
SXXOA.CISCO_BOOKED_FLAG,
SXXOA.BUNDLE_TYPE, 
SXXOA.QUANTITY, 
SXXOA.ATTRIBUTED_UNIT_LIST_PRICE, 
SXXOA.ATTRIBUTED_UNIT_NET_PRICE, 
SXXOA.BOOKINGS_PCT, 
SXXOA.ATTRIBUTED_PCT, 
SXXOA.PUBLISH_FLAG, 
SXXOA.TRX_TYPE, 
SXXOA.CREATED_BY, 
SXXOA.CREATION_DATE, 
SXXOA.LAST_UPDATED_BY, 
SXXOA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, 
SXXOA.ORIG_OA_ATTRIB_ID,
SXXOA.COST_UNIT_PRICE,
SXXOA.CISCO_WPL_UNIT_PRICE,
SXXOA.CISCO_GPL_UNIT_PRICE,
SXXOA.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, 
SXXOA.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
SXXOA.REFRESH_DATETIME,
'RI'  AS EXCEPTION_TYPE ,
 /*ADDED THE BELOW COLUMNS AS PART OF  OFFER ATTRIBUTION Q2FY15*/
  SXXOA.VERSION_ID,
SXXOA.OBSOLETE_FLAG ,
SXXOA.EXCEPTION_CODE ,
SXXOA.ATTRIBUTION_CODE ,
SXXOA.PARENT_SUB_SKU_OFFSET_ID ,
SXXOA.PARENT_SUB_SKU_ID ,
SXXOA.MULTI_OA_BUNDLE_ENABLED, 
/*Added as part of SFP FY21 March Rel*/
SXXOA.ATTRIBUTED_UNIT_NET_PRICE_LC,
SXXOA.CISCO_WPL_UNIT_PRICE_LC,
SXXOA.CISCO_GPL_UNIT_PRICE_LC,
SXXOA.CONVERSION_RATE
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_XXOA_ORDER_ATTRIB SXXOA

WHERE NOT EXISTS 
(
SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
WHERE SXXOA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID=NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT
)

SELECT 
 EXOA.BATCH_ID,
 EXOA.ACTION_CODE,
 EXOA.OA_ATTRIB_ID, 
 EXOA.ORDER_NUMBER, 
 EXOA.HEADER_ID, 
 EXOA.DATA_SOURCE, 
 EXOA.LINE_ID, 
 EXOA.PARENT_LINE_ID, 
 EXOA.ORDERED_ITEM, 
 EXOA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, 
 EXOA.ATTRIBUTION_FLAG , 
 EXOA.CISCO_BOOKED_FLAG,
 EXOA.BUNDLE_TYPE, 
 EXOA.QUANTITY, 
 EXOA.ATTRIBUTED_UNIT_LIST_PRICE, 
 EXOA.ATTRIBUTED_UNIT_NET_PRICE, 
 EXOA.BOOKINGS_PCT, 
 EXOA.ATTRIBUTED_PCT, 
 EXOA.PUBLISH_FLAG, 
 EXOA.TRX_TYPE, 
 EXOA.CREATED_BY, 
 EXOA.CREATION_DATE, 
 EXOA.LAST_UPDATED_BY, 
 EXOA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, 
 EXOA.ORIG_OA_ATTRIB_ID,
 EXOA.COST_UNIT_PRICE,
 EXOA.CISCO_WPL_UNIT_PRICE,
 EXOA.CISCO_GPL_UNIT_PRICE,
 EXOA.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, 
 EXOA.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
 EXOA.REFRESH_DATETIME,
 EXOA.EXCEPTION_CODE ,
 EXOA.VERSION_ID,
 EXOA.OBSOLETE_FLAG ,
EXOA.ATTRIBUTION_CODE ,
EXOA.PARENT_SUB_SKU_OFFSET_ID ,
EXOA.PARENT_SUB_SKU_ID ,
EXOA.MULTI_OA_BUNDLE_ENABLED,
/*Added as part of SFP FY21 March Rel*/
EXOA.ATTRIBUTED_UNIT_NET_PRICE_LC,
EXOA.CISCO_WPL_UNIT_PRICE_LC,
EXOA.CISCO_GPL_UNIT_PRICE_LC,
EXOA.CONVERSION_RATE
 FROM
 $$EXCEPDB.EX_POS_XXOA_ORDER_ATTRIB  EXOA
 
 WHERE NOT EXISTS 
 (
 SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXOA_ORDER_ATTRIB  SXXOA
 WHERE EXOA.OA_ATTRIB_ID=SXXOA.OA_ATTRIB_ID
 )

/* UPDATED THE WORK LOGIC(TV LOGIC TO BE REPLACED WITH UPDATE ELSE INSERT)  AS PART OF OFFER ATTRIBUTION  Q2FY15*/
SELECT 
STOA.OA_ATTRIB_ID AS BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
NP.ITEM_KEY AS ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY,
ORDER_NUMBER AS BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
COALESCE(ORIG_OA_ATTRIB_ID,-9999) AS BK_ORGNL_OFFR_ATTRBTN_ID_INT,
COALESCE(ATTRIBUTED_PCT, -999.00) AS ATTRIBUTION_PCT, 
COALESCE(QUANTITY ,0)AS PRODUCT_ATTRIBUTED_QTY,
COALESCE(ATTRIBUTED_UNIT_LIST_PRICE ,0.0000000) AS UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT,
COALESCE(ATTRIBUTED_UNIT_NET_PRICE ,0.0000000) AS UNIT_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT,
COALESCE(TRX_TYPE,'ORDER') AS TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE(CISCO_GPL_UNIT_PRICE ,0.0000000) AS UNIT_GLOBAL_LST_PRC_USD_AMT,
COALESCE(CISCO_WPL_UNIT_PRICE ,0.0000000) AS UNIT_WHOLESALE_LST_PRC_USD_AMT,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
 USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME AS START_TV_DTM,
CASE 
WHEN STOA.OBSOLETE_FLAG = 'Y' THEN  CAST(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME AS TIMESTAMP(0)) - INTERVAL '1' SECOND 
WHEN  NPOSTV.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT IS NULL OR STOA.OBSOLETE_FLAG <> 'Y' THEN  CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))  
    ELSE  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  END AS END_TV_DTM,
  'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
CASE WHEN NPOSTV.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT IS NULL THEN 'I' ELSE 'U' END AS DML_TYPE,
VERSION_ID,
OBSOLETE_FLAG ,
COALESCE(ATTRIBUTION_FLAG ,'=') AS ATTRIBUTION_TOP_SKU_FLG,
/*CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER)  AS TOP_SKU_POS_TRX_ID_INT,*/
 COALESCE(PARENT_LINE_ID,STOA.LINE_ID) AS TOP_SKU_POS_TRX_ID_INT, /* Modified the derivation of TOP_SKU_POS_TRX_ID_INT :Q3FY15*/
COALESCE(STOA.EXCEPTION_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS EXCEPTION_REASON_CD,
CASE WHEN STOA.EXCEPTION_CODE IS NULL THEN 'SUCCESS' ELSE 'FAILURE' END AS  EXCEPTION_STATUS_CD,
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME AS SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
DATA_SOURCE  AS DISTI_POS_TRX_TYPE_CD /*Added as part of OA-POS Q4FY15 to distinguish between different POS transactions*/
/* NRS MPOB Changes */
,STOA.LINE_ID
,STOA.PARENT_LINE_ID
,STOA.BUNDLE_TYPE
, CASE WHEN STOA.PARENT_LINE_ID IS NULL THEN 'OFFSET'  
				  WHEN (STOA.ATTRIBUTION_CODE IN ( 'ATTRIBUTED MULTI LEVEL SUB SKU', 'DEAL ATTRIBUTED MULTI LEVEL SUB SKU' ) ) THEN 'BIB' 
				  WHEN (STOA.ATTRIBUTION_CODE IN ( 'OFFSET MULTI LEVEL SUB SKU', 'DEAL OFFSET MULTI LEVEL SUB SKU' )) THEN 'BIB OFFSET' 
				  ELSE 'ATTRIBUTED' END AS ATTRIBUTION_CD
,COALESCE(CASE WHEN STOA.ATTRIBUTION_CODE IN ( 'OFFSET MULTI LEVEL SUB SKU', 'DEAL OFFSET MULTI LEVEL SUB SKU' ) THEN STOA.PARENT_SUB_SKU_OFFSET_ID ELSE  COALESCE(STOA.PARENT_SUB_SKU_ID,SXOA_MPOB.OA_ATTRIB_ID) END,-999) AS PARENT_OFFER_ATTRI_ID_INT 
     ,STOA.PARENT_SUB_SKU_OFFSET_ID
	 ,STOA.PARENT_SUB_SKU_ID
 ,CASE WHEN (STOA.ATTRIBUTION_CODE IN ('DEAL ATTRIBUTED MULTI LEVEL SUB SKU', 'DEAL OFFSET MULTI LEVEL SUB SKU', 'DEAL ATTRIBUTED SUB SKU' ))
 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS AS_ARCHITECTURE_FLG /* Q1FY20 AS ARCH SKU IN REGULAR OA FLOW */
/*Added as part of SFP FY21 March Rel*/
,CASE WHEN STOA.CONVERSION_RATE IS NULL THEN COALESCE(STOA.ATTRIBUTED_UNIT_NET_PRICE,0.0000000)
	  ELSE COALESCE(STOA.ATTRIBUTED_UNIT_NET_PRICE_LC,0.0000000) 
  END AS UNIT_NET_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT
,CASE WHEN STOA.CONVERSION_RATE IS NULL THEN COALESCE(STOA.CISCO_GPL_UNIT_PRICE,0.0000000)
	  ELSE COALESCE(STOA.CISCO_GPL_UNIT_PRICE_LC,0.0000000) 
  END AS UNIT_GLOBL_LIST_PRC_LCL_AMT
,CASE WHEN STOA.CONVERSION_RATE IS NULL THEN COALESCE(STOA.CISCO_WPL_UNIT_PRICE,0.0000000)
	  ELSE COALESCE(STOA.CISCO_WPL_UNIT_PRICE_LC,0.0000000) 
  END AS UNIT_WHOLESALE_LST_PRC_LCL_AMT
,COALESCE(STOA.CONVERSION_RATE,1.0000000) AS CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE
FROM  $$STGDB.ST_XXOA_ORDER_ATTRIB STOA
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP 
ON STOA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID=NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT
LEFT OUTER JOIN
(SELECT  BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRX_LINE_OFFER_ATRBTN 
GROUP BY 1
)NPOSTV
ON NPOSTV.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT=STOA.OA_ATTRIB_ID
 LEFT JOIN 	 (SEL OA_ATTRIB_ID,LINE_ID  FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXOA_ORDER_ATTRIB
WHERE BUNDLE_TYPE='Multiple Performance Obligations (MPOB)' AND ATTRIBUTION_CODE='OFFSET TOP SKU' group by 1,2)SXOA_MPOB
ON STOA.PARENT_LINE_ID=SXOA_MPOB.LINE_ID
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY STOA.OA_ATTRIB_ID ORDER BY SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME ASC) = 1
 
UNION 

SELECT 
STOA.OA_ATTRIB_ID AS BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
NP.ITEM_KEY AS ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY,
ORDER_NUMBER AS BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
COALESCE(ORIG_OA_ATTRIB_ID,-9999) AS BK_ORGNL_OFFR_ATTRBTN_ID_INT,
COALESCE(ATTRIBUTED_PCT, -999.00) AS ATTRIBUTION_PCT, 
COALESCE(QUANTITY ,0)AS PRODUCT_ATTRIBUTED_QTY,
COALESCE(ATTRIBUTED_UNIT_LIST_PRICE ,0.0000000) AS UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT,
COALESCE(ATTRIBUTED_UNIT_NET_PRICE ,0.0000000) AS UNIT_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT,
COALESCE(TRX_TYPE,'ORDER') AS TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE(CISCO_GPL_UNIT_PRICE ,0.0000000) AS UNIT_GLOBAL_LST_PRC_USD_AMT,
COALESCE(CISCO_WPL_UNIT_PRICE ,0.0000000) AS UNIT_WHOLESALE_LST_PRC_USD_AMT,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
 USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME AS START_TV_DTM,
CASE 
WHEN STOA.OBSOLETE_FLAG = 'Y' THEN  CAST(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME AS TIMESTAMP(0)) - INTERVAL '1' SECOND  
WHEN  NPOSTV.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT IS NULL OR STOA.OBSOLETE_FLAG <> 'Y' THEN  CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))  
     ELSE  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  END AS END_TV_DTM,
  'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
'U' AS DML_TYPE,
VERSION_ID,
OBSOLETE_FLAG ,
COALESCE(ATTRIBUTION_FLAG ,'=') AS ATTRIBUTION_TOP_SKU_FLG,
/*CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER)  AS TOP_SKU_POS_TRX_ID_INT,*/
 COALESCE(PARENT_LINE_ID,STOA.LINE_ID) AS TOP_SKU_POS_TRX_ID_INT, /* Modified the derivation of TOP_SKU_POS_TRX_ID_INT :Q3FY15*/
COALESCE(STOA.EXCEPTION_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS EXCEPTION_REASON_CD,
CASE WHEN STOA.EXCEPTION_CODE IS NULL THEN 'SUCCESS' ELSE 'FAILURE' END AS  EXCEPTION_STATUS_CD,
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME AS SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
DATA_SOURCE  AS DISTI_POS_TRX_TYPE_CD /*Added as part of OA-POS Q4FY15 to distinguish between different POS transactions*/
/* NRS MPOB Changes */
,STOA.LINE_ID
,STOA.PARENT_LINE_ID
,STOA.BUNDLE_TYPE
, CASE WHEN STOA.PARENT_LINE_ID IS NULL THEN 'OFFSET'  
				  WHEN (STOA.ATTRIBUTION_CODE IN ( 'ATTRIBUTED MULTI LEVEL SUB SKU', 'DEAL ATTRIBUTED MULTI LEVEL SUB SKU' )) THEN 'BIB' 
				  WHEN (STOA.ATTRIBUTION_CODE IN ( 'OFFSET MULTI LEVEL SUB SKU', 'DEAL OFFSET MULTI LEVEL SUB SKU' )) THEN 'BIB OFFSET' 
				  ELSE 'ATTRIBUTED' END AS ATTRIBUTION_CD
,COALESCE(CASE WHEN STOA.ATTRIBUTION_CODE IN ( 'OFFSET MULTI LEVEL SUB SKU', 'DEAL OFFSET MULTI LEVEL SUB SKU' ) THEN STOA.PARENT_SUB_SKU_OFFSET_ID ELSE  COALESCE(STOA.PARENT_SUB_SKU_ID,SXOA_MPOB.OA_ATTRIB_ID) END,-999) AS PARENT_OFFER_ATTRI_ID_INT  
,STOA.PARENT_SUB_SKU_OFFSET_ID
,STOA.PARENT_SUB_SKU_ID
 ,CASE WHEN (STOA.ATTRIBUTION_CODE IN ('DEAL ATTRIBUTED MULTI LEVEL SUB SKU', 'DEAL OFFSET MULTI LEVEL SUB SKU', 'DEAL ATTRIBUTED SUB SKU' ))
 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS AS_ARCHITECTURE_FLG
/*Added as part of SFP FY21 March Rel*/
,CASE WHEN STOA.CONVERSION_RATE IS NULL THEN COALESCE(STOA.ATTRIBUTED_UNIT_NET_PRICE,0.0000000)
	  ELSE COALESCE(STOA.ATTRIBUTED_UNIT_NET_PRICE_LC,0.0000000) 
  END AS UNIT_NET_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT
,CASE WHEN STOA.CONVERSION_RATE IS NULL THEN COALESCE(STOA.CISCO_GPL_UNIT_PRICE,0.0000000)
	  ELSE COALESCE(STOA.CISCO_GPL_UNIT_PRICE_LC,0.0000000) 
  END AS UNIT_GLOBL_LIST_PRC_LCL_AMT
,CASE WHEN STOA.CONVERSION_RATE IS NULL THEN COALESCE(STOA.CISCO_WPL_UNIT_PRICE,0.0000000)
	  ELSE COALESCE(STOA.CISCO_WPL_UNIT_PRICE_LC,0.0000000) 
  END AS UNIT_WHOLESALE_LST_PRC_LCL_AMT
,COALESCE(STOA.CONVERSION_RATE,1.0000000) AS CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE
FROM  $$STGDB.ST_XXOA_ORDER_ATTRIB STOA
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP 
ON STOA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID=NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT
LEFT OUTER JOIN
(SELECT  BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRX_LINE_OFFER_ATRBTN 
GROUP BY 1
)NPOSTV
ON NPOSTV.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT=STOA.OA_ATTRIB_ID
 LEFT JOIN 	 (SEL OA_ATTRIB_ID,LINE_ID  FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXOA_ORDER_ATTRIB
WHERE BUNDLE_TYPE='Multiple Performance Obligations (MPOB)' AND ATTRIBUTION_CODE='OFFSET TOP SKU' group by 1,2)SXOA_MPOB
ON STOA.PARENT_LINE_ID=SXOA_MPOB.LINE_ID
WHERE STOA.OA_ATTRIB_ID IN 
  ( SELECT OA_ATTRIB_ID FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXOA_ORDER_ATTRIB STOA GROUP BY OA_ATTRIB_ID HAVING COUNT(1) >1) 

  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY STOA.OA_ATTRIB_ID ORDER BY SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME DESC) = 1

SELECT 
WIPOS.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   ,
WIPOS.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY        ,
WIPOS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT     ,
WIPOS.BK_ORGNL_OFFR_ATTRBTN_ID_INT  ,
WIPOS.ATTRIBUTION_PCT               ,
WIPOS.PRODUCT_ATTRIBUTED_QTY        ,
WIPOS.UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT       ,
WIPOS.UNIT_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT        ,
WIPOS.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD           ,
WIPOS.UNIT_GLOBAL_LST_PRC_USD_AMT   ,
WIPOS.UNIT_WHOLESALE_LST_PRC_USD_AMT,
WIPOS.EDW_CREATE_DTM                ,
WIPOS.EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
WIPOS.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                ,
WIPOS.EDW_UPDATE_USER               ,
WIPOS.START_TV_DTM                  ,
WIPOS.END_TV_DTM                    ,
WIPOS.VERSION_ID_INT                ,
WIPOS.OBSOLETE_FLG                  ,
WIPOS.ATTRIBUTION_TOP_SKU_FLG       ,
WIPOS.TOP_SKU_POS_TRX_ID_INT        ,
WIPOS.EXCEPTION_REASON_CD           ,
WIPOS.EXCEPTION_STATUS_CD           ,
WIPOS.ACTION_CODE                   ,
WIPOS.DML_TYPE                      ,
WIPOS.DISTI_POS_TRX_TYPE_CD
,WIPOS.ATTRIBUTION_CD
,WIPOS.PARENT_OFFER_ATTRIB_ID_INT /* 3 NRS MPOB columns added*/
,CASE  WHEN WIPOS.BUNDLE_TYPE = 'Multiple Performance Obligations (MPOB)' THEN 'MPOB' /*This WHEN Covers BIB, BIB OFFSET & Stand Alone OFFSET*/
		WHEN (WIPOS.ATTRIBUTION_CD  = 'ATTRIBUTED' AND  WIPOS_MPOB.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT IS NOT NULL ) THEN 'MPOB' 
	ELSE 'UNKNOWN'  END	AS POB_TYPE_CD 
,COALESCE( WIPOS_MPOB.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY,-999)  AS DV_POB_TOP_PRDT_KEY
,WIPOS.AS_ARCHITECTURE_FLG
,CASE WHEN COALESCE(NPBP.ITEM_KEY,-999)<0 THEN 'UNK' WHEN NPBP.ACV_FLG ='Y' THEN 'ACV' ELSE 'TCV' END AS BOOKINGS_POLICY_CD 
/*Added as part of SFP FY21 March Rel*/
,WIPOS.UNIT_NET_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT
,WIPOS.UNIT_GLOBL_LIST_PRC_LCL_AMT
,WIPOS.UNIT_WHOLESALE_LST_PRC_LCL_AMT
,WIPOS.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE
FROM $$STGDB.WI_POS_TRX_LINE_OFFER_ATRBTN WIPOS
  LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.WI_POS_TRX_LINE_OFFER_ATRBTN WIPOS_MPOB ON WIPOS_MPOB.BUNDLE_TYPE = 'Multiple Performance Obligations (MPOB)' AND 
   ((WIPOS_MPOB.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT  = WIPOS.PARENT_SUB_SKU_ID  AND WIPOS_MPOB.ATTRIBUTION_CD = 'BIB' ) OR
	(WIPOS_MPOB.PARENT_SUB_SKU_ID   IS NULL AND   WIPOS_MPOB.LINE_ID  = WIPOS.PARENT_LINE_ID AND  WIPOS_MPOB.ATTRIBUTION_CD = 'OFFSET'  ) ) 
	 LEFT  JOIN 
   (SELECT  WIPOA.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,WIPOA.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,NPOS.POS_TRX_LINE_POSTED_DATE,
   COALESCE(NP.ITEM_KEY,-999) AS ITEM_KEY,NP.ACV_FLG AS ACV_FLG,NP.END_TV_DATE
   FROM (SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_POS_TRX_LINE_OFFER_ATRBTN )WIPOA
   LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE NPOS
   ON NPOS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT=WIPOA.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
   AND NPOS.DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD IN ('POS','DSV_POS')
   LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_TV NP
   ON NP.ITEM_KEY = WIPOA.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY
   WHERE NPOS.POS_TRX_LINE_POSTED_DATE BETWEEN NP.START_TV_DATE AND END_TV_DATE
   
    UNION 
	
    SELECT  WIDSVOA.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,WIDSVOA.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,NPOS.POS_TRX_LINE_POSTED_DATE,
   COALESCE(NP.ITEM_KEY,-999) AS ITEM_KEY,NP.ACV_FLG AS ACV_FLG,NP.END_TV_DATE
   FROM (SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_POS_TRX_LINE_OFFER_ATRBTN )WIDSVOA
   LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BKG_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE NPOS
   ON NPOS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT=WIDSVOA.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
      LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_TV NP
   ON NP.ITEM_KEY = WIDSVOA.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY
   WHERE NPOS.POS_TRX_LINE_POSTED_DATE BETWEEN NP.START_TV_DATE AND END_TV_DATE
   
   ) NPBP
   ON NPBP.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = WIPOS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
   AND NPBP.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT=WIPOS.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
   AND NPBP.ITEM_KEY =WIPOS.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY
   QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY WIPOS.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,WIPOS.DML_TYPE ORDER BY WIPOS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME DESC) = 1
